  | WHERE `metrics.process.cpu.time` IS NOT NULL
  | STATS cpu_time_rate = SUM(RATE(`metrics.process.cpu.time`))
          BY @timestamp = TBUCKET(1 minute), `attributes.cpu.mode`
  | EVAL user_cpu_time = CASE(`attributes.cpu.mode` == "user", cpu_time_rate, NULL),
         system_cpu_time = CASE(`attributes.cpu.mode` == "system", cpu_time_rate, NULL)
  | STATS `User CPU Time (s/s)` = SUM(user_cpu_time),
          `System CPU Time (s/s)` = SUM(system_cpu_time)
          BY @timestamp
  | SORT @timestamp"},"attributes":{"title":"CPU Time","visualizationType":"lnsXY","references":[],"state":{"datasourceStates":{"textBased":{"layers":{"php-cpu-time-layer":{"index":"APM_STATIC_DATA_VIEW_ID","query":{"esql":"TS {{indexPattern}}

  | WHERE `metrics.php.memory.usage` IS NOT NULL
     OR `metrics.php.memory.peak_usage` IS NOT NULL
  | EVAL mem_emalloc       = CASE(`attributes.memory.type` == "emalloc",  `metrics.php.memory.usage`,      NULL),
         mem_overhead      = CASE(`attributes.memory.type` == "overhead", `metrics.php.memory.usage`,      NULL),
         mem_peak_emalloc  = CASE(`attributes.memory.type` == "emalloc",  `metrics.php.memory.peak_usage`, NULL),
         mem_peak_overhead = CASE(`attributes.memory.type` == "overhead", `metrics.php.memory.peak_usage`, NULL)
  | STATS `Usage Emalloc (B)`      = AVG(mem_emalloc),
          `Usage Overhead (B)`     = AVG(mem_overhead),
          `Peak Emalloc (B)`       = AVG(mem_peak_emalloc),
          `Peak Overhead (B)`      = AVG(mem_peak_overhead)
          BY @timestamp = BUCKET(@timestamp, 1 minute)"},"attributes":{"title":"Memory Usage","visualizationType":"lnsXY","references":[],"state":{"datasourceStates":{"textBased":{"layers":{"php-memory-usage-layer":{"index":"APM_STATIC_DATA_VIEW_ID","query":{"esql":"FROM {{indexPattern}}

  | WHERE `metrics.php.opcache.memory_used` IS NOT NULL
     OR `metrics.php.opcache.memory_free` IS NOT NULL
     OR `metrics.php.opcache.memory_wasted` IS NOT NULL
     OR `metrics.php.opcache.interned_strings.memory_used` IS NOT NULL
     OR `metrics.php.opcache.interned_strings.memory_free` IS NOT NULL
  | STATS `Used (B)`                  = AVG(`metrics.php.opcache.memory_used`),
          `Free (B)`                  = AVG(`metrics.php.opcache.memory_free`),
          `Wasted (B)`                = AVG(`metrics.php.opcache.memory_wasted`),
          `Interned Strings Used (B)` = AVG(`metrics.php.opcache.interned_strings.memory_used`),
          `Interned Strings Free (B)` = AVG(`metrics.php.opcache.interned_strings.memory_free`)
          BY @timestamp = BUCKET(@timestamp, 1 minute)"},"attributes":{"title":"OPcache Memory","visualizationType":"lnsXY","references":[],"state":{"datasourceStates":{"textBased":{"layers":{"php-opcache-memory-layer":{"index":"APM_STATIC_DATA_VIEW_ID","query":{"esql":"FROM {{indexPattern}}
  | WHERE `metrics.php.opcache.memory_used` IS NOT NULL
     OR `metrics.php.opcache.memory_free` IS NOT NULL
     OR `metrics.php.opcache.memory_wasted` IS NOT NULL
     OR `metrics.php.opcache.interned_strings.memory_used` IS NOT NULL
     OR `metrics.php.opcache.interned_strings.memory_free` IS NOT NULL
  | STATS `Used (B)`                  = AVG(`metrics.php.opcache.memory_used`),
          `Free (B)`                  = AVG(`metrics.php.opcache.memory_free`),
          `Wasted (B)`                = AVG(`metrics.php.opcache.memory_wasted`),
          `Interned Strings Used (B)` = AVG(`metrics.php.opcache.interned_strings.memory_used`),
          `Interned Strings Free (B)` = AVG(`metrics.php.opcache.interned_strings.memory_free`)
          BY @timestamp = BUCKET(@timestamp, 1 minute)"},"columns":[{"columnId":"Used (B)","fieldName":"Used (B)","label":"Used (B)","customLabel":false,"meta":{"type":"number","esType":"double"},"inMetricDimension":true},{"columnId":"Free (B)","fieldName":"Free (B)","label":"Free (B)","customLabel":false,"meta":{"type":"number","esType":"double"},"inMetricDimension":true},{"columnId":"Wasted (B)","fieldName":"Wasted (B)","label":"Wasted (B)","customLabel":false,"meta":{"type":"number","esType":"double"},"inMetricDimension":true},{"columnId":"Interned Strings Used (B)","fieldName":"Interned Strings Used (B)","label":"Interned Strings Used (B)","customLabel":false,"meta":{"type":"number","esType":"double"},"inMetricDimension":true},{"columnId":"Interned Strings Free (B)","fieldName":"Interned Strings Free (B)","label":"Interned Strings Free (B)","customLabel":false,"meta":{"type":"number","esType":"double"},"inMetricDimension":true},{"columnId":"@timestamp","fieldName":"@timestamp","label":"@timestamp","customLabel":false,"meta":{"type":"date","esType":"date"},"inMetricDimension":true}],"timeField":"@timestamp"}},"indexPatternRefs":[{"id":"APM_STATIC_DATA_VIEW_ID","title":"traces-apm*,apm-*,traces-*.otel-*,logs-apm*,apm-*,logs-*.otel-*,metrics-apm*,apm-*,metrics-*.otel-*","timeField":"@timestamp"}]}},"filters":[],"query":{"esql":"FROM {{indexPattern}}
  | WHERE `metrics.php.opcache.memory_used` IS NOT NULL
     OR `metrics.php.opcache.memory_free` IS NOT NULL
     OR `metrics.php.opcache.memory_wasted` IS NOT NULL
     OR `metrics.php.opcache.interned_strings.memory_used` IS NOT NULL
     OR `metrics.php.opcache.interned_strings.memory_free` IS NOT NULL
  | STATS `Used (B)`                  = AVG(`metrics.php.opcache.memory_used`),
          `Free (B)`                  = AVG(`metrics.php.opcache.memory_free`),
          `Wasted (B)`                = AVG(`metrics.php.opcache.memory_wasted`),
          `Interned Strings Used (B)` = AVG(`metrics.php.opcache.interned_strings.memory_used`),
          `Interned Strings Free (B)` = AVG(`metrics.php.opcache.interned_strings.memory_free`)
          BY @timestamp = BUCKET(@timestamp, 1 minute)"},"visualization":{"legend":{"isVisible":true,"position":"bottom","isInside":false,"verticalAlignment":"bottom","horizontalAlignment":"right","showSingleSeries":true,"legendStats":[],"shouldTruncate":true,"maxLines":1},"valueLabels":"hide","fittingFunction":"Linear","axisTitlesVisibilitySettings":{"x":false,"yLeft":false,"yRight":true},"tickLabelsVisibilitySettings":{"x":true,"yLeft":true,"yRight":true},"labelsOrientation":{"x":0,"yLeft":0,"yRight":0},"gridlinesVisibilitySettings":{"x":true,"yLeft":true,"yRight":true},"preferredSeriesType":"line","emphasizeFitting":true,"layers":[{"layerId":"php-opcache-memory-layer","seriesType":"line","xAccessor":"@timestamp","accessors":["Used (B)","Free (B)","Wasted (B)","Interned Strings Used (B)","Interned Strings Free (B)"],"yConfig":[],"layerType":"data","colorMapping":{"assignments":[],"specialAssignments":[{"rule":{"type":"other"},"color":{"type":"loop"},"touched":false}],"paletteId":"eui_amsterdam_color_blind","colorMode":{"type":"categorical"}}}]},"internalReferences":[],"adHocDataViews":{}}}},"panelIndex":"php-opcache-memory","gridData":{"x":0,"y":30,"w":24,"h":15,"i":"php-opcache-memory"}},{"type":"lens","title":"OPcache Statistics","embeddableConfig":{"enhancements":{"dynamicActions":{"events":[]}},"hidePanelTitles":false,"syncColors":false,"syncCursor":true,"syncTooltips":false,"filters":[],"query":{"esql":"TS {{indexPattern}}
  | WHERE `metrics.php.opcache.hits` IS NOT NULL
     OR `metrics.php.opcache.hit_rate` IS NOT NULL
     OR `metrics.php.opcache.misses` IS NOT NULL
     OR `metrics.php.opcache.cached_scripts` IS NOT NULL
     OR `metrics.php.opcache.interned_strings.count` IS NOT NULL
  | STATS `Hit Rate (%)` = AVG(AVG_OVER_TIME(`metrics.php.opcache.hit_rate`)),
          `Hits (/s)` = SUM(RATE(`metrics.php.opcache.hits`)),
          `Misses (/s)` = SUM(RATE(`metrics.php.opcache.misses`)),
          `Cached Scripts` = AVG(AVG_OVER_TIME(`metrics.php.opcache.cached_scripts`)),
          `Interned Strings` = AVG(AVG_OVER_TIME(`metrics.php.opcache.interned_strings.count`))
          BY @timestamp = TBUCKET(1 minute)
  | SORT @timestamp"},"attributes":{"title":"OPcache Statistics","visualizationType":"lnsXY","references":[],"state":{"datasourceStates":{"textBased":{"layers":{"php-opcache-stats-layer":{"index":"APM_STATIC_DATA_VIEW_ID","query":{"esql":"TS {{indexPattern}}
  | WHERE `metrics.php.opcache.hits` IS NOT NULL
     OR `metrics.php.opcache.hit_rate` IS NOT NULL
     OR `metrics.php.opcache.misses` IS NOT NULL
     OR `metrics.php.opcache.cached_scripts` IS NOT NULL
     OR `metrics.php.opcache.interned_strings.count` IS NOT NULL
  | STATS `Hit Rate (%)` = AVG(AVG_OVER_TIME(`metrics.php.opcache.hit_rate`)),
          `Hits (/s)` = SUM(RATE(`metrics.php.opcache.hits`)),
          `Misses (/s)` = SUM(RATE(`metrics.php.opcache.misses`)),
          `Cached Scripts` = AVG(AVG_OVER_TIME(`metrics.php.opcache.cached_scripts`)),
          `Interned Strings` = AVG(AVG_OVER_TIME(`metrics.php.opcache.interned_strings.count`))

         `Log Queue %`  = ROUND(`Log Queue Size`  / `Log Queue Capacity`  * 100, 2)
  | SORT `Last Seen` DESC
  | LIMIT 50"},"columns":[{"columnId":"service.name","fieldName":"service.name","label":"service.name","customLabel":false,"meta":{"type":"string","esType":"keyword"},"inMetricDimension":true},{"columnId":"Span Queue Size","fieldName":"Span Queue Size","label":"Span Queue Size","customLabel":false,"meta":{"type":"number","esType":"double"},"inMetricDimension":true},{"columnId":"Span Queue Capacity","fieldName":"Span Queue Capacity","label":"Span Queue Capacity","customLabel":false,"meta":{"type":"number","esType":"double"},"inMetricDimension":true},{"columnId":"Span Queue %","fieldName":"Span Queue %","label":"Span Queue %","customLabel":false,"meta":{"type":"number","esType":"double"},"inMetricDimension":true},{"columnId":"Log Queue Size","fieldName":"Log Queue Size","label":"Log Queue Size","customLabel":false,"meta":{"type":"number","esType":"double"},"inMetricDimension":true},{"columnId":"Log Queue Capacity","fieldName":"Log Queue Capacity","label":"Log Queue Capacity","customLabel":false,"meta":{"type":"number","esType":"double"},"inMetricDimension":true},{"columnId":"Log Queue %","fieldName":"Log Queue %","label":"Log Queue %","customLabel":false,"meta":{"type":"number","esType":"double"},"inMetricDimension":true},{"columnId":"Last Seen","fieldName":"Last Seen","label":"Last Seen","customLabel":false,"meta":{"type":"date","esType":"date"},"inMetricDimension":true}],"timeField":"@timestamp"}},"indexPatternRefs":[{"id":"APM_STATIC_DATA_VIEW_ID","title":"traces-apm*,apm-*,traces-*.otel-*,logs-apm*,apm-*,logs-*.otel-*,metrics-apm*,apm-*,metrics-*.otel-*","timeField":"@timestamp"}]}},"filters":[],"query":{"esql":"FROM {{indexPattern}}
  | WHERE `metrics.otel.sdk.processor.span.queue.size` IS NOT NULL
     OR `metrics.otel.sdk.processor.log.queue.size` IS NOT NULL
  | STATS
      `Span Queue Size`     = AVG(`metrics.otel.sdk.processor.span.queue.size`),
      `Span Queue Capacity` = AVG(`metrics.otel.sdk.processor.span.queue.capacity`),
      `Log Queue Size`      = AVG(`metrics.otel.sdk.processor.log.queue.size`),
      `Log Queue Capacity`  = AVG(`metrics.otel.sdk.processor.log.queue.capacity`),
      `Last Seen`           = MAX(@timestamp)
      BY `service.name`
  | EVAL `Span Queue %` = ROUND(`Span Queue Size` / `Span Queue Capacity` * 100, 2),
         `Log Queue %`  = ROUND(`Log Queue Size`  / `Log Queue Capacity`  * 100, 2)
  | SORT `Last Seen` DESC
  | LIMIT 50"},"visualization":{"layerId":"fdb0892b-81de-44c4-a2ca-447cc4fc084e","layerType":"data","columns":[{"columnId":"service.name","isTransposed":false},{"columnId":"Span Queue Size","isTransposed":false},{"columnId":"Span Queue Capacity","isTransposed":false},{"columnId":"Span Queue %","isTransposed":false},{"columnId":"Log Queue Size","isTransposed":false},{"columnId":"Log Queue Capacity","isTransposed":false},{"columnId":"Log Queue %","isTransposed":false},{"columnId":"Last Seen","isTransposed":false}],"rowHeight":"auto","rowHeightLines":1,"headerRowHeight":"auto","headerRowHeightLines":1},"internalReferences":[],"adHocDataViews":{}}}},"panelIndex":"php-overview-table","gridData":{"x":24,"y":75,"w":24,"h":15,"i":"php-overview-table"}}]
